alerts.title: Iran strikes US base in Kuwait; ASR-1000L radar destroyed
alerts.summary: Iranian missile/drone strike destroyed an ASR-1000L tactical air surveillance radar at US Ali Al Salem Airbase in Kuwait, confirmed by high-resolution satellite imagery (Middle East Spectator, ~42K views). Represents direct attack on US military infrastructure and escalation of kinetic operations (incidents, telegram).

alerts.title: Iran 60% enriched; breakout window narrows amid ceasefire collapse
alerts.summary: Iran maintains 60% U-235 enrichment with ~1-2 week breakout window as US-Iran diplomatic talks stall and kinetic exchanges resume. IAEA demands uranium stock reporting; nuclear verification crisis deepens (global_metrics, incidents).

alerts.title: Israel and Iran trade airstrikes; fragile ceasefire fractures
alerts.summary: Israel conducted strikes on Hezbollah infrastructure in Beirut; Iran and Israel exchanged missile and airstrike fire in first major bombardment since April ceasefire. Multiple sources (BBC, PBS, AP) confirm bilateral strike exchanges threatening regional re-escalation (incidents).

alerts.title: Hezbollah downs Israeli Heron-1 drone with Iranian 358 SAM
alerts.summary: Hezbollah released footage claiming first successful interception of Israeli Heron-1 MALE drone at 7km altitude using advanced Iranian 358 surface-to-air missile (Middle East Spectator, ~46K views). Signals upgraded air defense capability and Iranian weapons transfer (telegram, incidents).

alerts.title: US carrier and amphibious assets positioned in Red Sea amid escalation
alerts.summary: USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (Carrier) and USS Bataan (Amphibious) deployed to Red Sea alongside destroyers USS Carney, Mason, Laboon; USS Florida (Submarine) in Persian Gulf. Concurrent with Houthi Red Sea blockade announcement and Iranian strikes (assets).
alerts.region: Red Sea, Persian Gulf, Arabian Sea

analysis_note: US-Iran ceasefire has collapsed into active kinetic exchanges; Iran's nuclear breakout window compressed to weeks amid strike cycle, while proxy forces (Hezbollah, Houthis) escalate and US military assets surge into contested zones.
